win_condition: After Round 14, total all farm-scoring categories; highest VP wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most remaining resources wins; if still tied, share victory.

categories.label: Fields
categories.description: Score by fields track on Agricola scoring table.

categories.label: Pastures
categories.description: Score by fenced pastures track on scoring table.

categories.label: Grain
categories.description: Score by grain count track on scoring table.

categories.label: Vegetables
categories.description: Score by vegetable count track on scoring table.

categories.label: Sheep
categories.description: Score by sheep count track on scoring table.

categories.label: Wild Boar
categories.description: Score by boar count track on scoring table.

categories.label: Cattle
categories.description: Score by cattle count track on scoring table.

categories.label: Rooms
categories.description: 1 VP per room (house material changes value in some editions; apply table/edition rules).

categories.label: Cards & Improvements Bonus
categories.description: Bonus VP from Occupations, Minor and Major Improvements.
